summary: layout.tsx is 2,352 lines — monolithic god object handling sidebar, projects, drag-drop, resize, errors, dialogs, notifications, tabs, workspaces, deep links, prefetching in a single file
prompt-input.tsx is 1,991 lines — combines text editor, file/agent/image attachment management, model selector, context management, slash commands, drag drop, spring animation in one file
packages/ui has zero component rendering tests — 150+ SolidJS .tsx components with only 6 pure utility files tested (25 total test cases)
Dual v1/v2 UI rendering gated by newLayoutDesigns feature flag — 30+ parallel v2 components must be maintained alongside v1 until migration completes
server-sync.tsx uses raw createContext/useContext while every other context provider uses createSimpleContext — inconsistent pattern
